changes.before: mold that said days rather than hours
changes.after: mold thick enough for days of abandonment
That was more than Jaina had been giving her on the road.

changes.before: That was a different answer from the one Jaina had been giving on the road—the full thought, not the soldier-sized version she had been breaking apart for an officer she did not yet trust to want the whole thing.
changes.after: That was more than Jaina had been giving her on the road.

changes.before: a body remembering how legs worked by force of habit
changes.after: legs moving by force of habit

changes.before: It meant she had already spent her screams on the days before.
No comfort in it, only confirmation.
Not the one who came every season. A different one.
changes.after: A different one from the man who came every season.

changes.before: Sixty bodies moving in a column toward Quel'Thalas meant intent, and intent meant a hand on the line somewhere out in the dark.
changes.after: Sixty bodies moving in a column toward Quel'Thalas was warning enough.

changes.before: that's her being lazy, not me being lost.
changes.after: that's her being lazy, and I'm still on the road.

changes.before: Surprise settled into his face by degrees, the heavy sort that took time to fit against what a man thought the world was half a mile ago.
changes.after: His mouth eased open a fraction.

changes.before: His gaze kept moving down the lane as if the right angle might produce the missing people.
changes.after: He kept searching the lane for the missing people.

changes.before: His attention settled on her bow, her armor, her ears.
changes.after: He took in her bow, her armor, her ears.

changes.before: He said it the way locals said useful things on bad roads—without drama, in pieces, leaving the listener to know which part mattered.
The dead had gone north. The living still had to go south.
